_meta.description: Cloned brand voices for Qwen3-TTS Base model. Each entry maps a stable voice_id to a reference audio clip + transcript. The Base model extracts a speaker embedding from (ref_audio, ref_text) at startup and caches it, so every /tts call with this voice_id reproduces the SAME voice.

requirements.ref_audio: WAV 24kHz, single speaker, minimal background noise
requirements.ref_text: VERBATIM transcript of ref_audio (Qwen3-TTS requires this for cloning)
requirements.embedding_cache: Extracted once at container startup by inference.create_voice_clone_prompt(); reused for every /tts call

_meta.source: Common Voice Nigerian English corpus (CC0/public domain). Single speaker per clip, self-recorded. Transcripts contain natural filler speech — the verbatim text preserves the exact utterance.
